description_long: This is an adult pedestrian dressed in urban outdoor attire, featuring a quilted vest layered over a hooded jacket with a high collar and face covering. The individual wears fitted pants with reinforced knee patches and utility pockets, suggesting a practical, tactical style. Gloves cover the hands, and sturdy, lace-up shoes with thick soles are worn on the feet. The head is covered by a hood, and the face is partially obscured by a mask, leaving only the eyes visible. Accessories such as a pouch or holster are attached to the belt, enhancing the utilitarian appearance. The overall look is functional and suited for cold or inclement weather in an urban environment.
description: An adult urban pedestrian in tactical, layered outerwear with a hood, face covering, gloves, and utility accessories. The attire is practical and suited for cold weather.
description_view_0: Front view shows the hooded head, face covering, quilted vest, gloves, and utility belt details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the hood, face mask, and the side pouch on the belt.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hood, quilted vest, and utility belt, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the hood, face mask, and the holster or pouch on the right hip.
attribute_clothing_type: quilted vest over hooded jacket, fitted pants with utility pockets, gloves, and face mask
